channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Obasanjo Shares 40-Year Journey Managing Diabetes Through Healthy Lifestyle
item.description: Former Nigerian President Olusegun Obasanjo don share how e don dey manage diabetes for more than 40 years, despite say no cure dey. According to am, e discipline for lifestyle, dey chop better food, ...

item.title: Pakistani and foreign crew still hostage after Somali pirates hijack oil tanker, negotiations ongoing
item.description: Nearly 40 days after the hijacking of the oil tanker Honour 25 near the Somali coast, around a dozen Pakistani crew members continue to remain in captivity along with other foreign sailors. The vessel...

item.title: ILO begins decisive negotiations on global labor standards for gig economy workers
item.description: Nagsimula na ang International Labour Organization (ILO) ng huling round ng negosasyon para makabuo ng kauna-unahang binding na global standards para sa mga gig workers, kabilang ang mga nagtatrabaho ...

item.title: Opinion Column Urges Democrats to Prioritize Electability and Grassroots Activism Ahead of the 2026 Midterms
item.description: This opinion article by Jason Miciak argues that Democrats and anti-MAGA voters should stop waiting for scandals to politically damage Donald Trump and instead focus on direct political engagement ahe...

item.title: Marles backs revised AUKUS plan to acquire three second-hand US submarines despite ongoing concerns
item.description: Defence Minister Richard Marles has reaffirmed Australia’s commitment to the AUKUS submarine program following a significant revision to its delivery plan, which now prioritises acquiring three second...

item.title: Rupert Everett reflects on his turbulent past, career struggles, and later-life discipline
item.description: Rupert Everett, now 67, reflects candidly on a life marked by excess, self-sabotage and eventual personal growth. In conversation during a London heatwave, he contrasts his current self with his young...

item.title: Anti-immigration group says 30 June deadline for undocumented migrants will be peaceful amid border enforcement push in South Africa
item.description: An anti-immigration movement in South Africa has stated that its planned actions linked to a 30 June deadline for undocumented migrants to leave the country will remain peaceful and will not involve v...

item.title: Documents Show Justice Scalia Influenced Supreme Court to Hear Cheney Energy Task Force Case
item.description: Newly released documents reveal that Justice Antonin Scalia played a decisive role in persuading the Supreme Court to hear a case involving then-Vice President Dick Cheney’s energy task force. Origina...

item.title: Alberta explores three potential northern B.C. oil pipeline routes and coastal ports
item.description: Internal documents obtained by CBC News reveal that the Alberta government has been examining three potential pipeline routes through northern British Columbia as part of its plan to build a major oil...

item.title: Indira Jaising reflects on democratic lawyering and her focus on workers’ and women’s rights
item.description: This excerpt from The Constitution Is My Home features senior advocate Indira Jaising reflecting on her journey in law and her commitment to representing marginalised groups, particularly working wome...

item.title: Fragmented opposition allows ANC to retain influence in key metros
item.description: In Johannesburg and Nelson Mandela Bay, voters have shown clear dissatisfaction with the ANC’s management of municipal services. Issues such as inconsistent electricity supply, unreliable water provis...

item.title: Diarra tops NBC Premier League clean-sheet rankings as foreign goalkeepers dominate season
item.description: In the closing stages of the 2025/26 NBC Premier League season, foreign goalkeepers are continuing to make a strong impact in Tanzanian football, with Young Africans (Yanga) shot-stopper Djigui Diarra...

item.title: International court rules UK not liable for payments after Rwanda asylum agreement is scrapped
item.description: The United Kingdom has successfully avoided paying Rwanda millions of pounds following the collapse of an asylum deal, according to a ruling by an international court. The agreement, originally signed...

item.title: Eddie Murphy says he does not give career advice in Hollywood interview
item.description: Veteran Hollywood actor and comedian Eddie Murphy is featured in a report by ABS-CBN News North America, where he shares a straightforward stance about not giving career advice. The piece, published o...

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel criticizes Trump during Peabody Awards acceptance speech
item.description: Jimmy Kimmel used his Peabody Awards acceptance speech on Sunday night to sharply criticize President Donald Trump while highlighting the role of comedy and satire in American democracy. During the ce...

item.title: Divisions within the Democratic establishment shape California House primary races
item.description: The article from the Early Brief examines the political dynamics shaping California’s House primaries, focusing on internal divisions within the Democratic Party’s liberal establishment. It highlights...

item.title: Fans react to the conclusion of Euphoria’s final episode
item.description: The HBO series Euphoria concluded its third season on 31 May 2026, which creator Sam Levinson confirmed as the show’s final season. The finale was marked by tragedy, with Rue, played by Zendaya, dying...

item.title: Profile of Vanessa Pulgarin, First-Ever MGI All Stars Titleholder
item.description: This article published by ABS-CBN introduces Vanessa Pulgarin, highlighting her recognition as the first-ever MGI All Stars titleholder. The feature is presented as a brief profile designed to give re...

item.title: Paul Onuachu wins Süper Lig Goal of the Season for 2025/26 season
item.description: Paul Onuachu, the Nigerian Super Eagles striker, has been named the winner of the Süper Lig Goal of the Season award for the 2025/26 campaign after scoring a spectacular bicycle kick for Trabzonspor. ...

item.title: Interview Examines Links Between the War on Terror and the Rise of Right-Wing Extremism in the U.S.
item.description: This article summarizes a discussion between journalist Chris Hedges and investigative reporter Matt Kennard about the long-term political and social consequences of the War on Terror in the United St...
